mapper.select:
SELECT CNDT.BUYER_CD , CNDT.PR_BUYER_CD , CNDT.PR_DEPT_CD , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(CNDT.GATE_CD, CNDT.PR_BUYER_CD, CNDT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , ECHB.EXEC_NUM , ECHB.EXEC_SQ , CNHD.EXEC_SUBJECT , CNDT.PURCHASE_TYPE , CNDT.ITEM_CD , CNDT.ITEM_DESC , CNDT.ITEM_SPEC , CNDT.EXEC_QT , CNDT.UNIT_CD , CNVD.VENDOR_CD , GETVENDORNAME(CNVD.GATE_CD, CNVD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , CNVD.PIC_USER_NM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM , CNVD.PIC_TEL_NUM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM , CNVD.PIC_EMAIL AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL , CNHD.CUR ,(CASE WHEN CNHD.EXEC_TCO_FLAG = '1' THEN (CNDT.EXEC_AMT, 0) + (CNDT.TCO_AMT, 0) ELSE (CNDT.EXEC_AMT, 0) END) AS EXEC_AMT ,(CASE WHEN CNHD.EXEC_TCO_FLAG = '1' THEN (CNDT.TCO_YEAR, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS TCO_YEAR_CNT ,(CASE WHEN CNHD.EXEC_TCO_FLAG = '1' THEN (CNDT.TCO_AMT, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS TCO_AMT , CNHD.VAT_TYPE , (CNHD.EXEC_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS EXEC_DATE , CNHD.CTRL_USER_ID , getUserName(CNHD.GATE_CD, CNHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , CNDT.CONT_TYPE3 , CNDT.PB_BUYER_CD , CNDT.PR_NUM , CNDT.PR_SQ , PRHD.IF_TYPE , SUBSTR(PRHD.IF_TYPE, 1, 2) AS IF_FLAG ,(PRHD.PR_TYPE, '10') AS PR_TYPE , PRDT.PRE_CONT_NUM , PRDT.PRE_CONT_CNT , PRDT.PRE_BUYER_CD , PRDT.CM_REQ_ID FROM STOCECHB ECHB JOIN STOCCNVD CNVD ON (CNVD.GATE_CD = ECHB.GATE_CD AND CNVD.BUYER_CD = ECHB.BUYER_CD AND CNVD.EXEC_NUM = ECHB.EXEC_NUM AND CNVD.VENDOR_CD = ECHB.VENDOR_CD AND CNVD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCCNHD CNHD ON (CNHD.GATE_CD = CNVD.GATE_CD AND CNHD.BUYER_CD = CNVD.BUYER_CD AND CNHD.EXEC_NUM = CNVD.EXEC_NUM AND CNHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCCNDT CNDT ON (CNDT.GATE_CD = ECHB.GATE_CD AND CNDT.BUYER_CD = ECHB.BUYER_CD AND CNDT.EXEC_NUM = ECHB.EXEC_NUM AND CNDT.EXEC_SQ = ECHB.EXEC_SQ AND CNDT.VENDOR_CD = ECHB.VENDOR_CD AND CNDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPRDT PRDT ON (PRDT.GATE_CD = CNDT.GATE_CD AND PRDT.BUYER_CD = CNDT.PB_BUYER_CD AND PRDT.PR_NUM = CNDT.PR_NUM AND PRDT.PR_SQ = CNDT.PR_SQ) LEFT JOIN STOCPRHD PRHD ON (PRHD.GATE_CD = PRDT.GATE_CD AND PRHD.BUYER_CD = PRDT.BUYER_CD AND PRHD.PR_NUM = PRDT.PR_NUM) LEFT JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (ECHB.GATE_CD = CVUR.GATE_CD AND ECHB.VENDOR_CD = CVUR.COMPANY_CD AND CVUR.USER_ID = (SELECT MAX(C.USER_ID) FROM STOCCVUR C WHERE C.GATE_CD = CVUR.GATE_CD AND C.COMPANY_CD = CVUR.COMPANY_CD AND C.USE_FLAG = '1' AND C.MNG_YN = '1' AND C.DEL_FLAG = '0')) WHERE ECHB.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECHB.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND ECHB.DEPT_CD = #{ses.deptCd} AND ECHB.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND CNHD.EXEC_DATE >= (#{EXEC_FROM_DATE}) AND CNHD.EXEC_DATE <= (#{EXEC_TO_DATE})
AND CNVD.VENDOR_CD LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETVENDORNAME(CNVD.GATE_CD, CNVD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_NM}) '%'
AND CNDT.PR_BUYER_CD LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETBUYERNAME(CNDT.GATE_CD, CNDT.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%'
AND CNHD.EXEC_NUM LIKE '%' UPPER(#{EXEC_NUM}) '%'
AND UPPER(REPLACE(CNHD.EXEC_SUBJECT, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{EXEC_SUBJECT}, ' ', '')) '%'
AND CNHD.CTRL_USER_ID LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(CNHD.GATE_CD, CNHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_USER_NM}) '%'
AND PRDT.PRE_CONT_NUM LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PRE_CONT_NUM}) '%'
AND PRDT.CM_REQ_ID LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CM_REQ_ID}) '%'
AND PRHD.IF_TYPE = #{IF_TYPE}
ORDER BY ECHB.EXEC_NUM DESC, ECHB.EXEC_SQ
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCECCM ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , CONT_NUM , CONT_CNT , PR_BUYER_CD , PR_DEPT_CD , VENDOR_CD , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , PROGRESS_CD , CONT_AMT , SIGN_FLAG , METHOD_TYPE , PAY_TERMS , PO_CREATE_FLAG , IV_TYPE ) SELECT ECMT.GATE_CD , ECMT.BUYER_CD , ECMT.CONT_NUM , ECMT.CONT_CNT , ECMT.PR_BUYER_CD , ECMT.PR_DEPT_CD , ECMT.VENDOR_CD , SYSDATE AS REG_DATE , #{ses.userId} AS REG_USER_ID , SYSDATE AS MOD_DATE , #{ses.userId} AS MOD_USER_ID , '0' AS DEL_FLAG , '4200' AS PROGRESS_CD ,(SELECT SUM (ITEM_AMT) FROM STOCECMT WHERE GATE_CD = ECMT.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = ECMT.BUYER_CD AND CONT_NUM = ECMT.CONT_NUM AND CONT_CNT = ECMT.CONT_CNT AND PR_BUYER_CD = ECMT.PR_BUYER_CD AND PR_DEPT_CD = ECMT.PR_DEPT_CD AND VENDOR_CD = ECMT.VENDOR_CD AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS CONT_AMT , '0' AS SIGN_FLAG , NULL AS METHOD_TYPE , NULL AS PAY_TERMS , NULL AS PO_CREATE_FLAG , NULL AS IV_TYPE FROM STOCECMT ECMT WHERE ECMT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECMT.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND ECMT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ECMT.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY ECMT.GATE_CD , ECMT.BUYER_CD , ECMT.CONT_NUM , ECMT.CONT_CNT , ECMT.PR_BUYER_CD , ECMT.PR_DEPT_CD , ECMT.VENDOR_CD
mapper.select: SELECT ECRL.CONT_NUM, ECRL.CONT_CNT, (SELECT OECRL.FORM_NUM FROM STOCECRL OECRL WHERE OECRL.GATE_CD = ECRL.GATE_CD AND OECRL.BUYER_CD = ECRL.BUYER_CD AND OECRL.CONT_NUM = ECRL.CONT_NUM AND OECRL.CONT_CNT = ECRL.CONT_CNT AND OECRL.FORM_SQ = 0 ) AS FORM_NUM, -- 계약서 주서식번호 ECRL.FORM_NUM AS REL_FORM_NUM, ECCF.FORM_NM AS REL_FORM_NM, ECRL.CONTRACT_TEXT_NUM, -- 부서식 내용번호 ECRL.CONTRACT_TEXT, ECCF.FORM_TEXT_NUM, ECCF.FORM_TEXT, ECRL.REQUIRE_FLAG, ECRL.FORM_SQ AS REL_FORM_SQ, ECRL.FORM_CHECK_FLAG, ECCF.FORM_TYPE, GETCODENAME(ECCF.GATE_CD, 'M078', ECCF.FORM_TYPE, #{ses.langCd}) AS FORM_TYPE_NM ECCF.FORM_FILE_NM FROM STOCECCT ECCT JOIN STOCECRL ECRL ON (ECCT.GATE_CD = ECRL.GATE_CD AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = ECRL.BUYER_CD AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = ECRL.CONT_NUM AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = ECRL.CONT_CNT AND ECRL.FORM_SQ > 0 -- 부서식 AND ECRL.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCECCF ECCF ON (ECRL.GATE_CD = ECCF.GATE_CD AND ECRL.FORM_NUM = ECCF.FORM_NUM AND ECCF.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} ORDER BY ECRL.FORM_SQ ASC

SELECT CUST_CD AS BUYER_CD , CUST_NM AS BUYER_NM , ( CEO_USER_NM , '') AS BUYER_CEO_NM , IRS_NUM AS BUYER_IRS_NUM , TEL_NUM AS BUYER_TEL_NUM , ADDR1 ' ' ADDR2 AS BUYER_ADDR FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CUST_CD = #{PR_BUYER_CD} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT ECCM.BUYER_CD , ECCM.CONT_NUM , ECCM.CONT_CNT , ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD , ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD , ECCM.VENDOR_CD ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(ECCM.GATE_CD, ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD, ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , ECCM.CONT_AMT , ECCM.SIGN_FLAG , ECCM.METHOD_TYPE , (SELECT CODE_DESC FROM STOCCODD WHERE GATE_CD = ECCM.GATE_CD AND CODE_TYPE = ECCM.METHOD_TYPE AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS METHOD_TYPE_NM , ECCM.PAY_TERMS , ECCM.PO_CREATE_FLAG , ECCM.IV_TYPE ,(SELECT CONT_TYPE FROM STOCECRL ECRL JOIN STOCECCF ECCF ON (ECRL.GATE_CD = ECCF.GATE_CD /** 2020.08.11 제외 AND ECRL.BUYER_CD = ECCF.BUYER_CD*/ AND ECRL.FORM_NUM = ECCF.FORM_NUM AND ECCF.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECRL.GATE_CD = ECCM.GATE_CD AND ECRL.BUYER_CD = ECCM.BUYER_CD AND ECRL.CONT_NUM = ECCM.CONT_NUM AND ECRL.CONT_CNT = ECCM.CONT_CNT AND ECRL.FORM_SQ = '0' AND ECRL.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS CONT_TYPE
, NULL AS PROGRESS_CD , NULL AS PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM , '1' AS RECONT_FLAG
, ECCM.PROGRESS_CD , ECCM.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM , '0' AS RECONT_FLAG
FROM STOCECCM ECCM WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND BUYER_CD = (#{PRE_BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) AND CONT_NUM = #{PRE_CONT_NUM} AND CONT_CNT = #{PRE_CONT_CNT}
AND BUYER_CD = (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) AND CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT}
ORDER BY PR_DEPT_CD ASC

SELECT ECMT.BUYER_CD , ECMT.CONT_NUM , ECMT.CONT_CNT , ECMT.PR_BUYER_CD , ECMT.PR_DEPT_CD ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(ECMT.GATE_CD, ECMT.PR_BUYER_CD, ECMT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , ECMT.VENDOR_CD , ECMT.ITEM_SQ , ECMT.PURCHASE_TYPE -- 구매유형 , ECMT.ITEM_CD -- 품목코드 , ECMT.ITEM_DESC -- 품명 , ECMT.ITEM_SPEC -- 규격 , ECMT.MAKER_CD -- 제조사코드 ,GETMKBRNAME(ECMT.GATE_CD, ECMT.PR_BUYER_CD, 'MK', ECMT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , ECMT.MAKER_PART_NO -- 모델번호 , ECMT.ORIGIN_CD -- 원산지코드 , ECMT.ITEM_QT -- 수량 , ECMT.UNIT_CD -- 단위 , ECMT.ITEM_PRC -- 단가 , ECMT.ITEM_AMT -- 금액 ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN GETCOMCODE(BDHD.GATE_CD, 'M301', BDHD.CONT_TYPE1, 0, #{ses.langCd}) ELSE GETCOMCODE(CNDT.GATE_CD, 'M070', CNDT.RFX_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) || ' (' || GETCOMCODE(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M066', RQHD.VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) || ')' END) AS CONT_TYPE1 ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN GETCOMCODE(BDHD.GATE_CD, 'M302', BDHD.CONT_TYPE2, 0, #{ses.langCd}) ELSE NULL END) AS CONT_TYPE2 ,GETCOMCODE(BDHD.GATE_CD, 'M302', BDHD.CONT_TYPE2, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE2 -- 구매유형이 용역 인 경우 필수 , ECMT.SW_BIZ_AMT -- SW 사업대가 , ECMT.MNT_SANGJU_YN -- 상주여부 -- 구매유형이 물품/공사 인 경우 필수 , ECMT.CONSUMER_AMT -- 소비자금액 , ECMT.FC_MNT_TERM -- 무상유지보수기간 , ECMT.CH_RATE -- 유상요율 -- 구매유형이 유지보수 인 경우 필수 , ECMT.DOIB_AMOUNT -- 도입금액 , ECMT.MNT_RATE -- 유지보수요율 ,(ECMT.MNT_SDAY, 'YYYYMMDD') AS MNT_SDAY -- 유지보수시작일 ,(ECMT.MNT_EDAY, 'YYYYMMDD') AS MNT_EDAY -- 유지보수종료일 , ECMT.MNT_GUR_MONTH -- 개월수 , ECMT.RT_INSP_PERIOD -- 정기점검주기 , ECMT.FALT_RC_TG_TIME -- 장애복구묙표시간 ,(ECMT.DUE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DUE_DATE -- 납기요청일 , ECMT.IV_BUYER_CD -- 검수고객사 , ECMT.IV_DEPT_CD -- 검수부서/사무소 ,GETCUSTNAME(ECMT.GATE_CD, ECMT.IV_BUYER_CD) ' ' GETDEPTNAME(ECMT.GATE_CD, ECMT.IV_BUYER_CD, ECMT.IV_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS IV_BUYER_DEPT_NM , ECMT.IV_USER_ID -- 검수자ID ,GETUSERNAME(ECMT.GATE_CD, ECMT.IV_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS IV_USER_NM , ECMT."5_CONT_AMT" , ECMT."1_CONT_AMT" , ECMT.A_CONT_AMT , ECMT."2_CONT_AMT" , ECMT."3_CONT_AMT" , ECMT.CONT_WT_NUM , ECMT.RMK , ECMT.PB_BUYER_CD , ECMT.PR_NUM -- 구매의뢰번호 , ECMT.PR_SQ -- 구매의뢰순번 , PRHD.APP_DOC_NUM AS PR_APP_DOC_NUM , PRHD.APP_DOC_CNT AS PR_APP_DOC_CNT ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN 'BID' ELSE 'RFQ' END) AS RFX_TYPE ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN CNDT.BID_NUM ELSE CNDT.RFX_NUM END) AS RFX_NUM -- 견적/입찰번호 ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN CNDT.BID_CNT ELSE CNDT.RFX_CNT END) AS RFX_CNT -- 견적/입찰차수 ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN BDHD.APP_DOC_NUM ELSE RQHD.APP_DOC_NUM END) AS RFX_APP_DOC_NUM ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN BDHD.APP_DOC_CNT ELSE RQHD.APP_DOC_CNT END) AS RFX_APP_DOC_CNT ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN BDHD.ESTM_TYPE ELSE (CASE WHEN RQHD.EST_PRICE_TYPE = '1' THEN 'SE' ELSE 'ES' END) END) AS ESTM_PRC_FLAG -- 예정가격 작성여부(작성, 생략 등) ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN BDES.APP_DOC_NUM ELSE RXES.APP_DOC_NUM END) AS ESTM_APP_DOC_NUM ,(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN BDES.APP_DOC_CNT ELSE RXES.APP_DOC_CNT END) AS ESTM_APP_DOC_CNT , ECMT.EXEC_NUM -- 선정품의번호 , ECMT.EXEC_SQ -- 선정품의순번 , CNHD.APP_DOC_NUM AS EXEC_APP_DOC_NUM , CNHD.APP_DOC_CNT AS EXEC_APP_DOC_CNT , PRHD.IF_TYPE AS IF_TYPE_CD , PRHD.IF_TYPE , PRDT.PRE_BUYER_CD , PRDT.PRE_CONT_NUM , PRDT.PRE_CONT_CNT , PRDT.CM_REQ_ID -- IT포탈 의뢰번호 , PRDT.CM_REQ_DET_ID -- IT포탈 세부의뢰번호 , PRDT.MULPUM_ID -- IT포탈 품목ID , PRDT.CONT_GROUND -- 계약근기 , ECMT.N_CM_REQ_ID -- IT포탈 변경 의뢰번호 , ECMT.N_CM_REQ_DET_ID -- IT포탈 변경 세부의뢰번호 , ECMT.N_MULPUM_ID -- IT포탈 변경 품목ID ,(SELECT CONT_REQ_CD FROM STOCECCT WHERE GATE_CD = ECMT.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = ECMT.BUYER_CD AND CONT_NUM = ECMT.CONT_NUM AND CONT_CNT = ECMT.CONT_CNT) AS CONT_REQ_CD FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCCNDT CNDT ON (CNDT.GATE_CD = ECMT.GATE_CD AND CNDT.BUYER_CD = ECMT.BUYER_CD AND CNDT.EXEC_NUM = ECMT.EXEC_NUM AND CNDT.EXEC_SQ = ECMT.EXEC_SQ AND CNDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCCNHD CNHD ON (CNHD.GATE_CD = CNDT.GATE_CD AND CNHD.BUYER_CD = CNDT.BUYER_CD AND CNHD.EXEC_NUM = CNDT.EXEC_NUM AND CNHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCRQHD RQHD ON (RQHD.GATE_CD = CNDT.GATE_CD AND RQHD.BUYER_CD = CNDT.BUYER_CD AND RQHD.RFX_NUM = CNDT.RFX_NUM AND RQHD.RFX_CNT = CNDT.RFX_CNT AND RQHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDES RXES ON (RXES.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND RXES.BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND RXES.BID_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND RXES.BID_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT AND RXES.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDHD BDHD ON (BDHD.GATE_CD = CNDT.GATE_CD AND BDHD.BUYER_CD = CNDT.BUYER_CD AND BDHD.BID_NUM = CNDT.BID_NUM AND BDHD.BID_CNT = CNDT.BID_CNT AND BDHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDES BDES ON (BDES.GATE_CD = BDHD.GATE_CD AND BDES.BUYER_CD = BDHD.BUYER_CD AND BDES.BID_NUM = BDHD.BID_NUM AND BDES.BID_CNT = BDHD.BID_CNT AND BDES.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPRDT PRDT ON (PRDT.GATE_CD = ECMT.GATE_CD AND PRDT.BUYER_CD = ECMT.PB_BUYER_CD AND PRDT.PR_NUM = ECMT.PR_NUM AND PRDT.PR_SQ = ECMT.PR_SQ AND PRDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPRHD PRHD ON (PRHD.GATE_CD = PRDT.GATE_CD AND PRHD.BUYER_CD = PRDT.BUYER_CD AND PRHD.PR_NUM = PRDT.PR_NUM AND PRHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECMT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECMT.BUYER_CD = (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) AND ECMT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ECMT.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY PRDT.CM_REQ_DET_ID ASC, PRDT.MULPUM_ID ASC, ECMT.PR_DEPT_CD ASC, ECMT.ITEM_SQ ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCECCT ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , CONT_NUM , CONT_CNT , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , PROGRESS_CD , CONT_DATE , CONT_START_DATE , CONT_END_DATE , CONT_DESC , CONT_REQ_CD , CUR , CONT_AMT , VAT_TYPE , SUPPLY_AMT , VAT_AMT , DEPT_CD , CONT_USER_ID , VENDOR_CD , VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM , VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL , VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM , DELAY_RMK , DELAY_NUME_RATE , DELAY_DENO_RATE , STAMP_DUTY_FLAG , STAMP_DUTY_AMT , CONT_RMK , BUNDLE_NUM , SEND_DATE , CONT_CLOSE_DATE , CONT_CLOSE_RMK , CERT_TYPE , AMT_TYPE , MANUAL_CONT_FLAG , VENDOR_EDIT_FLAG , ORIGIN_CONT_START_DATE , AUTO_RENEW_FLAG , AUTO_RENEW_DATE , AUTO_RENEW_CNT , APPROVAL_FLAG , SIGN_STATUS , CREATE_TYPE ) SELECT GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , CONT_NUM , #{NEW_CONT_CNT} AS CONT_CNT , SYSDATE AS REG_DATE , #{ses.userId} AS REG_USER_ID , SYSDATE AS MOD_DATE , #{ses.userId} AS MOD_USER_ID , '0' AS DEL_FLAG , '4200' AS PROGRESS_CD , SYSDATE AS CONT_DATE , CONT_END_DATE + 1 AS CONT_START_DATE , NULL AS CONT_END_DATE , CONT_DESC , CONT_REQ_CD , CUR , CONT_AMT , VAT_TYPE , SUPPLY_AMT , VAT_AMT , DEPT_CD , CONT_USER_ID , VENDOR_CD , VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM , VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL , VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM , DELAY_RMK , DELAY_NUME_RATE , DELAY_DENO_RATE , STAMP_DUTY_FLAG , STAMP_DUTY_AMT , CONT_RMK , #{BUNDLE_NUM} AS BUNDLE_NUM , SEND_DATE , CONT_CLOSE_DATE , CONT_CLOSE_RMK , CERT_TYPE , AMT_TYPE , MANUAL_CONT_FLAG , VENDOR_EDIT_FLAG , ORIGIN_CONT_START_DATE , AUTO_RENEW_FLAG , AUTO_RENEW_DATE , AUTO_RENEW_CNT , APPROVAL_FLAG , 'T' AS SIGN_STATUS , 'CT' AS CREATE_TYPE -- 계약서작성구분(변경계약 = CT) FROM STOCECCT WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) AND CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'

INSERT INTO STOCECRL ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , CONT_NUM , CONT_CNT , FORM_NUM , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , REQUIRE_FLAG , FORM_SQ , CONTRACT_TEXT_NUM , FORM_CHECK_FLAG , CONTRACT_TEXT ) SELECT GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , CONT_NUM , #{NEW_CONT_CNT} AS CONT_CNT , FORM_NUM , SYSDATE AS REG_DATE , #{ses.userId} AS REG_USER_ID , SYSDATE AS MOD_DATE , #{ses.userId} AS MOD_USER_ID , '0' AS DEL_FLAG , REQUIRE_FLAG , FORM_SQ , #{CONTRACT_TEXT_NUM} , FORM_CHECK_FLAG , CONTRACT_TEXT FROM STOCECRL WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) AND CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND FORM_NUM = #{FORM_NUM} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'

INSERT INTO STOCECCM ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , CONT_NUM , CONT_CNT , PR_BUYER_CD , PR_DEPT_CD , VENDOR_CD , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , PROGRESS_CD , CONT_AMT , SIGN_FLAG , METHOD_TYPE , PAY_TERMS , PO_CREATE_FLAG , IV_TYPE ) SELECT GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , CONT_NUM , #{NEW_CONT_CNT} AS CONT_CNT , PR_BUYER_CD , PR_DEPT_CD , VENDOR_CD , SYSDATE AS REG_DATE , #{ses.userId} AS REG_USER_ID , SYSDATE AS MOD_DATE , #{ses.userId} AS MOD_USER_ID , '0' AS DEL_FLAG , '4200' AS PROGRESS_CD , CONT_AMT , SIGN_FLAG , METHOD_TYPE , PAY_TERMS , PO_CREATE_FLAG , IV_TYPE FROM STOCECCM WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) AND CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT}

INSERT INTO STOCECMT ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , CONT_NUM , CONT_CNT , PR_BUYER_CD , PR_DEPT_CD , VENDOR_CD , ITEM_SQ , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , CONT_WT_NUM , EXEC_NUM , EXEC_SQ , PURCHASE_TYPE , ITEM_CD , ITEM_DESC , ITEM_SPEC , MAKER_CD , MAKER_PART_NO , ORIGIN_CD , ITEM_QT , UNIT_CD , ITEM_PRC , ITEM_AMT , SW_BIZ_AMT , MNT_SANGJU_YN , CONSUMER_AMT , FC_MNT_TERM , CH_RATE , DOIB_AMOUNT , MNT_RATE , MNT_SDAY , MNT_EDAY , MNT_GUR_MONTH , RT_INSP_PERIOD , FALT_RC_TG_TIME , DUE_DATE , IV_BUYER_CD , IV_DEPT_CD , IV_USER_ID , PR_NUM , PR_SQ , "5_CONT_AMT" , "1_CONT_AMT" , "3_CONT_AMT" , "2_CONT_AMT" , A_CONT_AMT , B_CONT_AMT , D_CONT_AMT , C_CONT_AMT , PB_BUYER_CD , RMK ) SELECT GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , CONT_NUM , #{NEW_CONT_CNT} AS CONT_CNT , PR_BUYER_CD , PR_DEPT_CD , VENDOR_CD , ITEM_SQ , SYSDATE AS REG_DATE , #{ses.userId} AS REG_USER_ID , SYSDATE AS MOD_DATE , #{ses.userId} AS MOD_USER_ID , '0' AS DEL_FLAG , CONT_WT_NUM , EXEC_NUM , EXEC_SQ , PURCHASE_TYPE , ITEM_CD , ITEM_DESC , ITEM_SPEC , MAKER_CD , MAKER_PART_NO , ORIGIN_CD , ITEM_QT , UNIT_CD , ITEM_PRC , ITEM_AMT , SW_BIZ_AMT , MNT_SANGJU_YN , CONSUMER_AMT , FC_MNT_TERM , CH_RATE , DOIB_AMOUNT , MNT_RATE , MNT_SDAY , MNT_EDAY , MNT_GUR_MONTH , RT_INSP_PERIOD , FALT_RC_TG_TIME , DUE_DATE , IV_BUYER_CD , IV_DEPT_CD , IV_USER_ID , PR_NUM , PR_SQ , "5_CONT_AMT" , "1_CONT_AMT" , "3_CONT_AMT" , "2_CONT_AMT" , A_CONT_AMT , B_CONT_AMT , D_CONT_AMT , C_CONT_AMT , PB_BUYER_CD , RMK FROM STOCECMT WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) AND CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT}

INSERT INTO STOCECPC ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , CONT_NUM , CONT_CNT , PR_BUYER_CD , PR_DEPT_CD , VENDOR_CD , PAY_CNT , PY_BUYER_CD , PY_DEPT_CD , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , PAY_AMT , GUAR_TYPE , GUAR_PERCENT , GUAR_QT , VAT_FLAG , GUAR_AMT , RMK , GUAR_TYPE2 , GUARANTEER , PY_USER_ID , SIGN_FLAG , CTRL_USER_NM , CEO_USER_NM ) SELECT GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , CONT_NUM , #{NEW_CONT_CNT} AS CONT_CNT , PR_BUYER_CD , PR_DEPT_CD , VENDOR_CD , PAY_CNT , PY_BUYER_CD , PY_DEPT_CD , SYSDATE AS REG_DATE , #{ses.userId} AS REG_USER_ID , SYSDATE AS MOD_DATE , #{ses.userId} AS MOD_USER_ID , '0' AS DEL_FLAG , PAY_AMT , GUAR_TYPE , GUAR_PERCENT , GUAR_QT , VAT_FLAG , GUAR_AMT , RMK , GUAR_TYPE2 , GUARANTEER , PY_USER_ID , SIGN_FLAG , CTRL_USER_NM , CEO_USER_NM FROM STOCECPC WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) AND CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT}

INSERT INTO STOCECPY ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , CONT_NUM , CONT_CNT , PR_BUYER_CD , PR_DEPT_CD , VENDOR_CD , PAY_CNT , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , PAY_CNT_TYPE , PAY_CNT_NM , PAY_PERCENT , PAY_AMT , PAY_METHOD_TYPE , PAY_METHOD_NM , PAY_DUE_DATE ) SELECT GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , CONT_NUM , #{NEW_CONT_CNT} AS CONT_CNT , PR_BUYER_CD , PR_DEPT_CD , VENDOR_CD , PAY_CNT , SYSDATE AS REG_DATE , #{ses.userId} AS REG_USER_ID , SYSDATE AS MOD_DATE , #{ses.userId} AS MOD_USER_ID , '0' AS DEL_FLAG , PAY_CNT_TYPE , PAY_CNT_NM , PAY_PERCENT , PAY_AMT , PAY_METHOD_TYPE , PAY_METHOD_NM , PAY_DUE_DATE FROM STOCECPY WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) AND CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT}
mapper.select: SELECT REAL_FILE_NM , FILE_PATH , FILE_NM , FILE_EXTENSION , FILE_SIZE , (FILE_SQ + 1) AS FILE_SQ , FILE_PATH '/' FILE_NM '.' FILE_EXTENSION AS FULL_PATH FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND UUID = #{CONT_ATT_FILE_NUM} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT CF.GATE_CD , CF.FORM_NUM , CF.FORM_NM , CF.BUYER_CD , CF.FORM_TEXT_NUM , CF.FORM_TYPE , CF.APPROVAL_FLAG , CF.BUNDLE_FLAG , CF.ECONT_FLAG , CF.CONT_TYPE AS CONTRACT_FORM_TYPE , (CF.AUTO_RENEW_FLAG, '0') AS AUTO_RENEW_FLAG , CF.FORM_FILE_NM , '0' AS FORM_SQ FROM STOCECCF CF WHERE CF.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CF.FORM_TYPE = '100' -- 주서식(100), 부서식(200) AND CF.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND CF.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND CF.USE_FLAG = '1'
AND CF.FORM_FILE_NM NOT IN ( 'CCTR1030_C00066', 'CCTR1040_C00066', 'CCTR1070_C00066', 'CCTR1300', 'CCTR1302' )
AND (CF.BUNDLE_FLAG, '0') = #{bundleFlag} --일괄계약 여부
AND CF.FORM_NUM = (SELECT MAX(FORM_NUM) FROM STOCECRL WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND FORM_SQ = 0 -- 주서식 AND DEL_FLAG = '0')
AND CF.FORM_NUM = (SELECT (CASE WHEN MAX(RL.FORM_NUM) = 'FORM20080013' THEN (SELECT TEXT1 AS FORM_NUM FROM STOCCODD WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CODE_TYPE = 'NH0056' AND CODE = 'FORM20080013') WHEN MAX(RL.FORM_NUM) = 'FORM20080019' THEN (SELECT TEXT1 AS FORM_NUM FROM STOCCODD WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CODE_TYPE = 'NH0056' AND CODE = 'FORM20080019') WHEN MAX(RL.FORM_NUM) = 'FORM20080012' THEN (SELECT TEXT1 AS FORM_NUM FROM STOCCODD WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CODE_TYPE = 'NH0056' AND CODE = 'FORM20080012') ELSE MAX(RL.FORM_NUM) END) AS FORM_NUM FROM STOCECRL RL WHERE RL.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND RL.BUYER_CD = #{PRE_BUYER_CD} AND RL.CONT_NUM = #{PRE_CONT_NUM} AND RL.CONT_CNT = #{PRE_CONT_CNT} AND RL.FORM_SQ = 0 -- 주서식 AND RL.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY RL.FORM_NUM)
AND CF.FORM_NUM = (SELECT MAX(FORM_NUM) FROM STOCECRL WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{PRE_BUYER_CD} AND CONT_NUM = #{PRE_CONT_NUM} AND CONT_CNT = #{PRE_CONT_CNT} AND FORM_SQ = 0 -- 주서식 AND DEL_FLAG = '0')
AND CF.FORM_NUM = (SELECT MAX(FORM_NUM) FROM STOCECRL WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND CONT_NUM = (SELECT MAX(CONT_NUM) FROM STOCECCT WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND BUNDLE_NUM = #{BUNDLE_NUM} AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AND FORM_SQ = 0 -- 주서식 AND DEL_FLAG = '0')
AND UPPER(CF.FORM_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BASIC_SEARCH}) '%'
AND (CF.BUYER_CD = (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) OR CF.NH_COMM_FLAG = '1')
AND (CF.BUYER_CD = ((#{BUYER_CD}, #{PRE_BUYER_CD}), #{ses.companyCd}) OR CF.NH_COMM_FLAG = '1')
AND CF.BUYER_CD = ((#{BUYER_CD}, #{PRE_BUYER_CD}), #{ses.companyCd})
ORDER BY CF.FORM_NM , CF.BUYER_CD , CF.FORM_TYPE , CF.CONT_TYPE

SELECT A.BUYER_CD , A.CONT_NUM , A.CONT_CNT , A.PR_BUYER_CD , A.PR_DEPT_CD , A.BUYER_NM , A.PR_BUYER_NM , A.PR_DEPT_NM ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(A.GATE_CD, A.PR_BUYER_CD, A.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , A.RE_BUYER_CD , A.RE_DEPT_CD , A.RE_BUYER_NM , A.RE_DEPT_NM ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(A.GATE_CD, A.RE_BUYER_CD, A.RE_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS RE_BUYER_DEPT_NM , A.CONT_USER_ID , A.CONT_USER_NM , A.CONT_DESC , A.PROGRESS_CD
, GETCOMCODE(#{ses.gateCd},'M135', A.PROGRESS_CD ,'0' ,#{ses.langCd}) AS PROGRESS_CD_NM , GETCOMCODE(#{ses.gateCd},'NH0053', A.PROGRESS_CD ,'0' ,#{ses.langCd}) AS PROGRESS_CD_NM
, A.VENDOR_CD ,(CASE WHEN A.CONT_TYPE = '1120' THEN GETBUYERDEPTNAME(A.GATE_CD, A.VENDOR_CD, A.VENDOR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) ELSE A.VENDOR_NM END) AS VENDOR_NM -- 위수탁계약서인 경우 협력사는 지역농축협(고객사) , A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM , A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL , A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM , A.CONT_TYPE , A.CONT_REQ_CD , A.AUTO_RENEW_FLAG , A.FINISH_FLAG , (A.MANUAL_CONT_FLAG, 0) AS MANUAL_CONT_FLAG , A.BUNDLE_NUM , A.SIGN_STATUS ,(A.CONT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_DATE ,(A.ORIGIN_CONT_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS ORIGIN_CONT_START_DATE ,(A.CONT_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_START_DATE ,(A.CONT_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_END_DATE , A.CUR , A.CONT_AMT , A.CONT_AMT_SUM , A.PR_AMT , (A.REQ_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REQ_DATE , A.VAT_TYPE ,(A.SEND_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS SEND_DATE ,(A.CONT_CLOSE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_CLOSE_DATE , A.CONT_CLOSE_RMK , A.CONT_TYPE1 ,(CASE WHEN A.CONT_TYPE1 = 'RFQ' THEN '견적' ELSE GETCOMCODE(A.GATE_CD, 'M301', A.CONT_TYPE1, 0, #{ses.langCd}) END) AS CONT_TYPE1_TEXT , A.CONT_TYPE2 ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND UUID = A.ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ATT_FILE_CNT , A.ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND UUID = A.VENDOR_ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS VENDOR_ATT_FILE_CNT , A.VENDOR_ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND UUID = A.STAMP_ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS STAMP_ATT_FILE_CNT , A.STAMP_ATT_FILE_NUM , A.CERT_TYPE , A.S_SIGN_DATE , A.S_SIGN_ID , A.S_SING_NM , A.B_SIGN_DATE , A.B_SIGN_ID , A.B_SING_NM , A.GUAR_CNT , A.DI_GUAR_CNT , A.ADV_GUAR_CNT , A.WARR_GUAR_CNT , A.FORM_NM , A.FORM_FILE_NM , A.SUB_FORM_FILE_NM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND UUID = A.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS PDF_ATT_FILE_CNT , A.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM , A.VENDOR_DEPT_CD , A.ERP_SEND ,(CASE WHEN A.VENDOR_SEND_FLAG = '1' THEN '1' ELSE null END) AS VENDOR_SEND_FLAG , A.IF_TYPE , A.SIGN_PATH_NM , A.IF_YN FROM (SELECT CT.GATE_CD , CT.BUYER_CD ,GETCUSTNAME(CT.GATE_CD, CT.BUYER_CD) AS BUYER_NM , CT.CONT_NUM , CT.CONT_CNT , CT.CONT_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(CT.GATE_CD, CT.CONT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_USER_NM , CT.CONT_DESC , CT.PROGRESS_CD , CT.CONT_REQ_CD -- M134 , CASE WHEN CT.AUTO_RENEW_FLAG IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE CT.AUTO_RENEW_FLAG END AS AUTO_RENEW_FLAG -- M044 , CASE WHEN SYSDATE > CT.CONT_END_DATE THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS FINISH_FLAG , CT.MANUAL_CONT_FLAG , CT.BUNDLE_NUM , CT.SIGN_STATUS -- M020 , CT.CONT_DATE , CT.ORIGIN_CONT_START_DATE , CT.CONT_START_DATE , CT.CONT_END_DATE , CT.CUR -- M023 , CT.CONT_AMT AS CONT_AMT_SUM ,(SELECT SUM(B.PR_AMT) AS PR_AMT FROM (SELECT A.PR_AMT FROM (SELECT PRDT.PR_NUM, PRDT.PR_SQ, PRDT.PR_AMT FROM STOCECMT ECMT JOIN STOCPRDT PRDT ON (PRDT.GATE_CD = ECMT.GATE_CD AND PRDT.BUYER_CD = ECMT.PB_BUYER_CD AND PRDT.PR_NUM = ECMT.PR_NUM AND PRDT.PR_SQ = ECMT.PR_SQ AND PRDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECMT.GATE_CD = CT.GATE_CD AND ECMT.BUYER_CD = CT.BUYER_CD AND ECMT.CONT_NUM = CT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = CT.CONT_CNT AND ECMT.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY PRDT.PR_NUM, PRDT.PR_SQ, PRDT.PR_AMT ) A ) B ) AS PR_AMT ,(SELECT MAX(PRHD.REQ_DATE) FROM STOCECMT ECMT JOIN STOCPRDT PRDT ON (PRDT.GATE_CD = ECMT.GATE_CD AND PRDT.BUYER_CD = ECMT.PB_BUYER_CD AND PRDT.PR_NUM = ECMT.PR_NUM AND PRDT.PR_SQ = ECMT.PR_SQ AND PRDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPRHD PRHD ON (PRHD.GATE_CD = PRDT.GATE_CD AND PRHD.BUYER_CD = PRDT.BUYER_CD AND PRHD.PR_NUM = PRDT.PR_NUM AND PRHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECMT.GATE_CD = CT.GATE_CD AND ECMT.BUYER_CD = CT.BUYER_CD AND ECMT.CONT_NUM = CT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = CT.CONT_CNT AND ECMT.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS REQ_DATE , CT.VAT_TYPE -- M100 , CT.SEND_DATE , CT.CONT_CLOSE_DATE , CT.CONT_CLOSE_RMK ,(SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN (SELECT CONT_TYPE1 FROM STOCBDHD WHERE GATE_CD = CNDT.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = CNDT.BUYER_CD AND BID_NUM = CNDT.BID_NUM AND BID_CNT = CNDT.BID_CNT) WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'RFQ' THEN 'RFQ' ELSE 'PC' END) FROM STOCECMT ECMT JOIN STOCCNDT CNDT ON (CNDT.GATE_CD = ECMT.GATE_CD AND CNDT.BUYER_CD = ECMT.BUYER_CD AND CNDT.EXEC_NUM = ECMT.EXEC_NUM AND CNDT.EXEC_SQ = ECMT.EXEC_SQ) WHERE ECMT.GATE_CD = CT.GATE_CD AND ECMT.BUYER_CD = CT.BUYER_CD AND ECMT.CONT_NUM = CT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = CT.CONT_CNT AND ECMT.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS CONT_TYPE1 ,(SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'BID' THEN (SELECT CONT_TYPE2 FROM STOCBDHD WHERE GATE_CD = CNDT.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = CNDT.BUYER_CD AND BID_NUM = CNDT.BID_NUM AND BID_CNT = CNDT.BID_CNT) WHEN CNDT.RFX_TYPE = 'RFQ' THEN 'RFQ' ELSE 'PC' END) FROM STOCECMT ECMT JOIN STOCCNDT CNDT ON (CNDT.GATE_CD = ECMT.GATE_CD AND CNDT.BUYER_CD = ECMT.BUYER_CD AND CNDT.EXEC_NUM = ECMT.EXEC_NUM AND CNDT.EXEC_SQ = ECMT.EXEC_SQ) WHERE ECMT.GATE_CD = CT.GATE_CD AND ECMT.BUYER_CD = CT.BUYER_CD AND ECMT.CONT_NUM = CT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = CT.CONT_CNT AND ECMT.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS CONT_TYPE2 , CT.ATT_FILE_NUM , CT.VENDOR_ATT_FILE_NUM , CT.STAMP_ATT_FILE_NUM , CT.CERT_TYPE , SS.PR_BUYER_CD ,GETCUSTNAME(SS.GATE_CD, SS.PR_BUYER_CD) AS PR_BUYER_NM , SS.PR_DEPT_CD ,GETDEPTNAME(SS.GATE_CD, SS.PR_BUYER_CD, SS.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_DEPT_NM , SS.RE_BUYER_CD ,GETCUSTNAME(SS.GATE_CD, SS.RE_BUYER_CD) AS RE_BUYER_NM , SS.RE_DEPT_CD ,GETDEPTNAME(SS.GATE_CD, SS.RE_BUYER_CD, SS.RE_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS RE_DEPT_NM , SS.VENDOR_CD ,GETVENDORNAME(SS.GATE_CD, SS.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM ,SS.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM ,SS.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL ,SS.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM , SS.CONT_AMT , ECCF.CONT_TYPE ,(SS.B_SIGN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS B_SIGN_DATE , SS.B_SIGN_ID ,GETUSERNAME(SS.GATE_CD, SS.B_SIGN_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS B_SING_NM ,(SS.S_SIGN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS S_SIGN_DATE , SS.S_SIGN_ID ,GETUSERNAME(SS.GATE_CD, SS.S_SIGN_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS S_SING_NM , CASE WHEN SS.GUAR_CNT = 0 THEN (CASE WHEN DENO_GUAR_CNT = 0 THEN NULL ELSE 0 END) ELSE SS.GUAR_CNT END AS GUAR_CNT , CASE WHEN SS.DI_GUAR_CNT = 0 THEN (CASE WHEN DENO_DI_GUAR_CNT = 0 THEN NULL ELSE 0 END) ELSE SS.DI_GUAR_CNT END AS DI_GUAR_CNT , CASE WHEN SS.ADV_GUAR_CNT = 0 THEN (CASE WHEN DENO_ADV_GUAR_CNT = 0 THEN NULL ELSE 0 END) ELSE SS.ADV_GUAR_CNT END AS ADV_GUAR_CNT , CASE WHEN SS.WARR_GUAR_CNT = 0 THEN (CASE WHEN DENO_WARR_GUAR_CNT = 0 THEN NULL ELSE 0 END) ELSE SS.WARR_GUAR_CNT END AS WARR_GUAR_CNT , ECCF.FORM_NM , ECCF.FORM_FILE_NM , SS.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM , SS.VENDOR_DEPT_CD ,(SELECT LISTAGG('' || ECCF.FORM_FILE_NM, ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY (ECCR.REL_FORM_SQ, ECRL.FORM_SQ), ECCF.FORM_FILE_NM) AS SUB_FORM_FILE_NM FROM STOCECRL ECRL JOIN STOCECCF ECCF ON (ECRL.GATE_CD = ECCF.GATE_CD AND ECRL.FORM_NUM = ECCF.FORM_NUM AND ECCF.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCECCR ECCR ON (ECCF.GATE_CD = ECCR.GATE_CD AND ECCF.FORM_NUM = ECCR.FORM_NUM AND ECRL.FORM_NUM = ECCR.REL_FORM_NUM AND ECCR.DEL_FLAG = '0') -- 2021.01.15 : 계약서폼 중복으로 인한 오류 수정 WHERE ECRL.GATE_CD = CT.GATE_CD AND ECRL.BUYER_CD = CT.BUYER_CD AND ECRL.CONT_NUM = CT.CONT_NUM AND ECRL.CONT_CNT = CT.CONT_CNT AND ECRL.FORM_SQ > 0) AS SUB_FORM_FILE_NM ,(CT.ERP_SEND,'0') AS ERP_SEND , CT.VENDOR_SEND_FLAG ,(SELECT MAX(PRHD.IF_TYPE) FROM STOCECMT ECMT JOIN STOCPRDT PRDT ON (PRDT.GATE_CD = ECMT.GATE_CD AND PRDT.BUYER_CD = ECMT.PB_BUYER_CD AND PRDT.PR_NUM = ECMT.PR_NUM AND PRDT.PR_SQ = ECMT.PR_SQ AND PRDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPRHD PRHD ON (PRHD.GATE_CD = PRDT.GATE_CD AND PRHD.BUYER_CD = PRDT.BUYER_CD AND PRHD.PR_NUM = PRDT.PR_NUM AND PRHD.IF_TYPE IS NOT NULL AND PRHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECMT.GATE_CD = CT.GATE_CD AND ECMT.BUYER_CD = CT.BUYER_CD AND ECMT.CONT_NUM = CT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = CT.CONT_CNT AND ECMT.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS IF_TYPE ,(SELECT LISTAGG(CVUR.USER_NM,',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY SCTP.SIGN_PATH_SQ) FROM STOCSCTP SCTP JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = SCTP.GATE_CD AND CVUR.USER_ID = SCTP.SIGN_USER_ID) WHERE SCTP.GATE_CD = CT.GATE_CD AND SCTP.APP_DOC_NUM = CT.APP_DOC_NUM AND SCTP.APP_DOC_CNT = CT.APP_DOC_CNT AND SCTP.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS SIGN_PATH_NM ,(CT.IF_YN, '0') AS IF_YN -- ITPortal I/F 여부(2021.07.16) FROM STOCECCT CT JOIN (SELECT ECCT.GATE_CD , ECCT.BUYER_CD , ECCT.CONT_NUM , ECCT.CONT_CNT , ECCT.MANUAL_CONT_FLAG
,(CASE WHEN ECCT.MANUAL_CONT_FLAG = '1' THEN ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD ELSE ECPC_M.PY_BUYER_CD END) AS PR_BUYER_CD ,(CASE WHEN ECCT.MANUAL_CONT_FLAG = '1' THEN ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD ELSE ECPC_M.PY_DEPT_CD END) AS PR_DEPT_CD
,(CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN ECPC_M.PY_BUYER_CD ELSE ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD END) AS PR_BUYER_CD ,(CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN ECPC_M.PY_DEPT_CD ELSE ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD END) AS PR_DEPT_CD
, ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD AS RE_BUYER_CD , ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD AS RE_DEPT_CD , ECCM.VENDOR_CD AS VENDOR_CD , ECCT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM , ECCT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL , ECCT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM
,(CASE WHEN ECCT.MANUAL_CONT_FLAG = '1' THEN ECCM.CONT_AMT ELSE ECPC_M.PAY_AMT END) AS CONT_AMT
,(CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN ECPC_M.PAY_AMT ELSE ECCM.CONT_AMT END) AS CONT_AMT
, SUM(CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_TYPE = 'CONT' AND ECPC.GUAR_PERCENT > 0 AND ECPC.GUAR_TYPE2 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS GUAR_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_TYPE = 'DIF' AND ECPC.GUAR_AMT > 0 AND ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DI_GUAR_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_TYPE = 'ADV' AND ECPC.GUAR_PERCENT > 0 AND ECPC.GUAR_TYPE2 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN IVAP.GUAR_TYPE = 'ADV' AND IVAP.GUAR_PERCENT > 0 AND IVAP.GUAR_TYPE2 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ADV_GUAR_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_TYPE = 'WARR' AND ECPC.GUAR_PERCENT > 0 AND ECPC.GUAR_TYPE2 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN IVAP.GUAR_TYPE = 'WARR' AND IVAP.GUAR_PERCENT > 0 AND IVAP.GUAR_TYPE2 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS WARR_GUAR_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_TYPE = 'CONT' AND ECPC.GUAR_PERCENT > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DENO_GUAR_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_TYPE = 'DIF' AND ECPC.GUAR_AMT > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DENO_DI_GUAR_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_TYPE = 'ADV' AND ECPC.GUAR_PERCENT > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DENO_ADV_GUAR_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_TYPE = 'WARR' AND ECPC.GUAR_PERCENT > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DENO_WARR_GUAR_CNT , ECSVB.SIGN_DATE AS B_SIGN_DATE , ECSVB.SIGN_ID AS B_SIGN_ID , ECSVS.SIGN_DATE AS S_SIGN_DATE , ECSVS.SIGN_ID AS S_SIGN_ID
,(CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN ECPC_M.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM ELSE ECCM.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM END) AS PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM
,(CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN ECPC_M.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM ELSE ECCM.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM END) AS PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM
, NULL AS VENDOR_DEPT_CD FROM STOCECCT ECCT JOIN STOCECCM ECCM ON (ECCM.GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND ECCM.BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND ECCM.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND ECCM.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND ECCM.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCECPC ECPC_M ON (ECPC_M.GATE_CD = ECCM.GATE_CD AND ECPC_M.BUYER_CD = ECCM.BUYER_CD AND ECPC_M.CONT_NUM = ECCM.CONT_NUM AND ECPC_M.CONT_CNT = ECCM.CONT_CNT AND ECPC_M.PR_BUYER_CD = ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD AND ECPC_M.PR_DEPT_CD = ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD AND ECPC_M.VENDOR_CD = ECCM.VENDOR_CD AND ECPC_M.PAY_CNT = '0' AND ECPC_M.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCECPC ECPC ON (ECPC.GATE_CD = ECPC_M.GATE_CD AND ECPC.BUYER_CD = ECPC_M.BUYER_CD AND ECPC.CONT_NUM = ECPC_M.CONT_NUM AND ECPC.CONT_CNT = ECPC_M.CONT_CNT AND ECPC.PR_BUYER_CD = ECPC_M.PR_BUYER_CD AND ECPC.PR_DEPT_CD = ECPC_M.PR_DEPT_CD AND ECPC.VENDOR_CD = ECPC_M.VENDOR_CD AND ECPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVAP IVAP ON (IVAP.GATE_CD = ECPC.GATE_CD AND IVAP.BUYER_CD = ECPC.BUYER_CD AND IVAP.CONT_NUM = ECPC.CONT_NUM AND IVAP.CONT_CNT = ECPC.CONT_CNT AND IVAP.PR_BUYER_CD = ECPC.PR_BUYER_CD AND IVAP.PR_DEPT_CD = ECPC.PR_DEPT_CD AND IVAP.VENDOR_CD = ECPC.VENDOR_CD AND IVAP.PAY_CNT = ECPC.PAY_CNT AND IVAP.PY_BUYER_CD = ECPC.PY_BUYER_CD AND IVAP.PY_DEPT_CD = ECPC.PY_DEPT_CD AND IVAP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCECSV ECSVB ON (ECSVB.GATE_CD = ECCM.GATE_CD AND ECSVB.BUYER_CD = ECCM.BUYER_CD AND ECSVB.CONT_NUM = ECCM.CONT_NUM AND ECSVB.CONT_CNT = ECCM.CONT_CNT AND ECSVB.VENDOR_CD = ECCM.VENDOR_CD AND ECSVB.SIGN_ID = (CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN ECPC_M.SIGN_ID ELSE (SELECT USER_ID FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = ECCM.GATE_CD AND COMPANY_CD = ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD AND USER_ID = ECSVB.SIGN_ID AND USER_TYPE = 'B') END) AND ECSVB.USER_TYPE = 'B') LEFT JOIN STOCECSV ECSVS ON (ECSVS.GATE_CD = ECCM.GATE_CD AND ECSVS.BUYER_CD = ECCM.BUYER_CD AND ECSVS.CONT_NUM = ECCM.CONT_NUM AND ECSVS.CONT_CNT = ECCM.CONT_CNT AND ECSVS.VENDOR_CD = ECCM.VENDOR_CD AND ECSVS.SIGN_ID = (CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN ECSVS.SIGN_ID ELSE (SELECT USER_ID FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = ECCM.GATE_CD AND COMPANY_CD = ECCM.VENDOR_CD AND USER_ID = ECSVS.SIGN_ID AND USER_TYPE = 'B') END) AND ECSVS.USER_TYPE = (CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN 'S' ELSE 'B' END)) WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ((ECCT.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd}) OR (ECCT.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND (#{ses.companyCd} IN (ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD, ECPC_M.PY_BUYER_CD, ECCM.VENDOR_CD))) ) AND ECCT.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND (ECCT.MANUAL_CONT_FLAG IS NULL OR ECCT.MANUAL_CONT_FLAG != '1') -- 수기계약제외(내부관리용) AND ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL -- 다수계약서 제외(다수계약서는 구매의뢰로 진행하지 않음)
AND ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL -- 다수계약서 제외(다수계약서는 구매의뢰로 진행하지 않음)
AND (ECCT.MANUAL_CONT_FLAG IS NULL OR ECCT.MANUAL_CONT_FLAG != '1') -- 수기계약제외(내부관리용) AND ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NOT NULL -- 다수계약서 제외(다수계약서는 구매의뢰로 진행하지 않음)
AND ECCT.CONT_DATE >= (#{REG_DATE_FROM}) AND ECCT.CONT_DATE <= (#{REG_DATE_TO})
AND ECCT.CONT_END_DATE >= (#{REG_DATE_FROM}) AND ECCT.CONT_END_DATE <= (#{REG_DATE_TO})
AND ((UPPER(REPLACE(ECCT.CONT_DESC, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{CONT_NUM}, ' ', '')) '%') OR (ECCT.CONT_NUM LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_NUM}) '%') OR (ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_NUM}) '%') )
AND ECCT.CONT_USER_ID LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(ECCT.GATE_CD, ECCT.CONT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_USER_NM}) '%'
AND ((ECCT.CONT_USER_ID LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_USER_ID}) '%') OR (ECPC_M.PY_USER_ID LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_USER_ID}) '%') )
AND ((UPPER(GETUSERNAME(ECCT.GATE_CD, ECCT.CONT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_USER_NM}) '%') OR (UPPER(GETUSERNAME(ECPC_M.GATE_CD, ECPC_M.PY_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_USER_NM}) '%') )
AND ECCT.PROGRESS_CD IN
#{item}
AND ((UPPER(ECCT.CONT_DESC) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{NHCONT_NUM}) '%') OR (ECCT.CONT_NUM LIKE '%' UPPER(#{NHCONT_NUM}) '%') OR (ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM LIKE '%' UPPER(#{NHCONT_NUM}) '%') )
AND ((ECCT.CONT_USER_ID LIKE '%' UPPER(#{NHCONT_USER_ID}) '%') OR (ECPC_M.PY_USER_ID LIKE '%' UPPER(#{NHCONT_USER_ID}) '%') )
AND ((UPPER(GETUSERNAME(ECCT.GATE_CD, ECCT.CONT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{NHCONT_USER_NM}) '%') OR (UPPER(GETUSERNAME(ECPC_M.GATE_CD, ECPC_M.PY_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{NHCONT_USER_NM}) '%') )
AND ECCT.PROGRESS_CD IN
#{item}
AND ECCT.CONT_REQ_CD = #{CONT_REQ_CD}
AND ((ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_BUYER_CD}) '%') OR (ECPC_M.PY_BUYER_CD LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_BUYER_CD}) '%') )
AND ((UPPER(GETCUSTNAME(ECCM.GATE_CD, ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD)) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_BUYER_NM}) '%') OR (UPPER(GETCUSTNAME(ECPC_M.GATE_CD, ECPC_M.PY_BUYER_CD)) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_BUYER_NM}) '%') )
AND ((ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_DEPT_CD}) '%') OR (ECPC_M.PY_DEPT_CD LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_DEPT_CD}) '%') )
AND ((UPPER(GETDEPTNAME(ECCM.GATE_CD, ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD, ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_DEPT_NM}) '%') OR (UPPER(GETDEPTNAME(ECPC_M.GATE_CD, ECPC_M.PY_BUYER_CD, ECPC_M.PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_DEPT_NM}) '%') )
AND ECCM.VENDOR_CD LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_CD}) '%'
AND ((UPPER(GETVENDORNAME(ECCM.GATE_CD, ECCM.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_NM}) '%') OR (UPPER(GETCUSTNAME(ECCM.GATE_CD, ECCM.VENDOR_CD)) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_NM}) '%') )
GROUP BY ECCT.GATE_CD, ECCT.BUYER_CD, ECCT.CONT_NUM, ECCT.CONT_CNT, ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM, ECCT.MANUAL_CONT_FLAG ,ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD, ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD, ECCM.VENDOR_CD, ECCT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM, ECCT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL, ECCT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM ,ECCM.CONT_AMT ,ECPC_M.PY_BUYER_CD, ECPC_M.PY_DEPT_CD, ECPC_M.VENDOR_CD, ECPC_M.PAY_AMT ,ECSVS.SIGN_DATE, ECSVS.SIGN_ID, ECSVB.SIGN_DATE, ECSVB.SIGN_ID ,ECCM.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM, ECCM.VENDOR_DEPT_CD, ECPC_M.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM ) SS ON (SS.GATE_CD = CT.GATE_CD AND SS.BUYER_CD = CT.BUYER_CD AND SS.CONT_NUM = CT.CONT_NUM AND SS.CONT_CNT = CT.CONT_CNT) LEFT JOIN STOCECRL ECRL ON (ECRL.GATE_CD = CT.GATE_CD AND ECRL.BUYER_CD = CT.BUYER_CD AND ECRL.CONT_NUM = CT.CONT_NUM AND ECRL.CONT_CNT = CT.CONT_CNT AND ECRL.FORM_SQ = '0' AND ECRL.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCECCF ECCF ON (ECCF.GATE_CD = ECRL.GATE_CD AND ECCF.FORM_NUM = ECRL.FORM_NUM AND ECCF.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND ECCF.CONT_TYPE IN ('1110', '1130', '1210')
AND ECCF.CONT_TYPE = '1120'
) WHERE 1 = 1
AND UPPER(ECCF.FORM_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{FORM_NM}) '%'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STOCECMT ECMT WHERE ECMT.GATE_CD = CT.GATE_CD AND ECMT.BUYER_CD = CT.BUYER_CD AND ECMT.CONT_NUM = CT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = CT.CONT_CNT AND UPPER(ECMT.ITEM_DESC) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_DESC}) '%')
) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.CONT_TYPE1 = #{CONT_TYPE1}
AND A.CONT_TYPE2 = #{CONT_TYPE2}
AND A.FINISH_FLAG = #{FINISH_FLAG}
AND A.AUTO_RENEW_FLAG = #{AUTO_RENEW_FLAG}
AND A.IF_TYPE = #{IF_TYPE}
ORDER BY A.CONT_NUM DESC , A.CONT_CNT DESC

SELECT A.* , A.PY_BUYER_NM ' ' A.PY_DEPT_NM AS PY_BUYER_DEPT_NM FROM ( SELECT ECCT.BUYER_CD , ECCT.CONT_NUM , ECCT.CONT_CNT , ECPC_G.PR_BUYER_CD , ECPC_G.PR_DEPT_CD , ECPC_G.VENDOR_CD , ECPC_G.PY_BUYER_CD ,GETCUSTNAME(ECPC_G.GATE_CD, ECPC_G.PY_BUYER_CD) AS PY_BUYER_NM , ECPC_G.PY_DEPT_CD ,GETDEPTNAME(ECPC_G.GATE_CD, ECPC_G.PY_BUYER_CD, ECPC_G.PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_DEPT_NM , ECPC_G.PY_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(ECPC_G.GATE_CD, ECPC_G.PY_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_USER_NM , ECPC_G.PAY_AMT , ECPC_G.GUAR_TYPE , ECPC_G.GUAR_PERCENT , ECPC_G.GUAR_AMT , ECPC_G.SIGN_FLAG ,(ECPC_G.SIGN_ID, 'unsigned') AS SIGN_ID ,ECPC_G.CTRL_USER_NM AS CTRL_USER_NM ,ECPC_G.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM
, NULL AS GUAR_TYPE2 , NULL AS GUARANTEER , NULL AS GUAR_REQ_NUM_CNT , NULL AS GUAR_REQ_NUM , NULL AS GUAR_NUM , NULL AS BOND_BEGN_DATE , NULL AS BOND_FNSH_DATE , NULL AS ATT_FILE_NUM , 0 AS ATT_FILE_CNT , ECPC_D.GUAR_TYPE AS DI_GUAR_TYPE , 0 AS DI_GUAR_AMT , NULL AS DI_ATT_FILE_NUM , 0 AS DI_ATT_FILE_CNT , NULL AS PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM , NULL AS RMK
, ECPC_G.GUAR_TYPE2 , ECPC_G.GUARANTEER , CASE WHEN ECPC_G.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC_G.GUARANTEER = '20' THEN ECPC_G.GUAR_REQ_NUM ECCT.CONT_CNT WHEN ECPC_G.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC_G.GUARANTEER = '10' THEN ECPC_G.GUAR_REQ_NUM END GUAR_REQ_NUM_CNT , ECPC_G.GUAR_REQ_NUM , CASE WHEN ECPC_G.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC_G.GUARANTEER = '20' THEN (SUBSTR(ECPC_G.GUAR_NUM, 7, 14), '') WHEN ECPC_G.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC_G.GUARANTEER = '10' THEN (SUBSTR(ECPC_G.GUAR_NUM, 7, 18), '') END GUAR_NUM , ECPC_G.BOND_BEGN_DATE , ECPC_G.BOND_FNSH_DATE , ECPC_G.ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = ECPC_G.GATE_CD AND UUID = ECPC_G.ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ATT_FILE_CNT , ECPC_D.GUAR_TYPE AS DI_GUAR_TYPE ,(ECPC_D.GUAR_AMT, 0) AS DI_GUAR_AMT , ECPC_D.ATT_FILE_NUM AS DI_ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = ECPC_D.GATE_CD AND UUID = ECPC_D.ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS DI_ATT_FILE_CNT ,(CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN ECPC_G.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM ELSE ECCM.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM END) AS PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM , ECPC_G.RMK
,(SELECT CORP_TYPE FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = ECPC_G.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = ECPC_G.PY_BUYER_CD) AS CORP_TYPE FROM STOCECCT ECCT JOIN STOCECCM ECCM ON (ECCM.GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND ECCM.BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND ECCM.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND ECCM.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND ECCM.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCECPC ECPC_G ON (ECPC_G.GATE_CD = ECCM.GATE_CD AND ECPC_G.BUYER_CD = ECCM.BUYER_CD AND ECPC_G.CONT_NUM = ECCM.CONT_NUM AND ECPC_G.CONT_CNT = ECCM.CONT_CNT AND ECPC_G.PR_BUYER_CD = ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD AND ECPC_G.PR_DEPT_CD = ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD AND ECPC_G.VENDOR_CD = ECCM.VENDOR_CD AND ECPC_G.PAY_CNT = '0' AND ECPC_G.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCECPC ECPC_D ON (ECPC_G.GATE_CD = ECPC_D.GATE_CD AND ECPC_G.BUYER_CD = ECPC_D.BUYER_CD AND ECPC_G.CONT_NUM = ECPC_D.CONT_NUM AND ECPC_G.CONT_CNT = ECPC_D.CONT_CNT AND ECPC_G.PR_BUYER_CD = ECPC_D.PR_BUYER_CD AND ECPC_G.PR_DEPT_CD = ECPC_D.PR_DEPT_CD AND ECPC_G.VENDOR_CD = ECPC_D.VENDOR_CD AND ECPC_G.PY_BUYER_CD = ECPC_D.PY_BUYER_CD AND ECPC_G.PY_DEPT_CD = ECPC_D.PY_DEPT_CD AND ECPC_D.PAY_CNT = '-1' AND ECPC_D.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ECPC_G.PR_BUYER_CD = #{PR_BUYER_CD} AND ECPC_G.PR_DEPT_CD = #{PR_DEPT_CD} AND ECPC_G.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND ECCT.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT BUYER_CD , CONT_NUM , CONT_CNT , PR_BUYER_CD , PR_DEPT_CD , VENDOR_CD , PAY_CNT , PAY_CNT_TYPE , PAY_CNT_NM , PAY_PERCENT , PAY_AMT , PAY_METHOD_TYPE , PAY_METHOD_NM ,(PAY_DUE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS PAY_DUE_DATE
, '1' AS RECONT_FLAG
, '0' AS RECONT_FLAG
FROM STOCECPY WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) AND CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND PR_BUYER_CD = #{PR_BUYER_CD} AND PR_DEPT_CD = #{PR_DEPT_CD} AND VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT A.* , A.PY_BUYER_NM ' ' A.PY_DEPT_NM AS PY_BUYER_DEPT_NM FROM ( SELECT ECPC.CONT_NUM , ECPC.CONT_CNT , ECPC.PR_BUYER_CD , ECPC.PR_DEPT_CD , ECPC.VENDOR_CD , ECPC.PY_BUYER_CD ,GETCUSTNAME(ECPC.GATE_CD, ECPC.PY_BUYER_CD) AS PY_BUYER_NM , ECPC.PY_DEPT_CD ,GETDEPTNAME(ECPC.GATE_CD, ECPC.PY_BUYER_CD, ECPC.PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_DEPT_NM , ECPC.PY_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(ECPC.GATE_CD, ECPC.PY_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_USER_NM , ECPC.PAY_AMT , ECPC.PAY_CNT , ECPC.GUAR_TYPE , ECPC.GUAR_PERCENT , ECPC.GUAR_AMT , #{PAY_CNT_NM} AS PAY_CNT_NM , ECPC.SIGN_FLAG
, NULL AS GUAR_TYPE2 , NULL AS GUARANTEER , NULL AS GUAR_REQ_NUM_CNT , NULL AS GUAR_REQ_NUM , NULL AS GUAR_NUM , NULL AS BOND_BEGN_DATE , NULL AS BOND_FNSH_DATE , 0 AS GUAR_QT , NULL AS ATT_FILE_NUM , 0 AS ATT_FILE_CNT , NULL AS RMK
, ECPC.GUAR_TYPE2 , ECPC.GUARANTEER , CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '20' THEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM ECPC.CONT_CNT WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '10' THEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM END GUAR_REQ_NUM_CNT , ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM , CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '20' THEN (SUBSTR(ECPC.GUAR_NUM, 7, 14), '') WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '10' THEN (SUBSTR(ECPC.GUAR_NUM, 7, 18), '') END GUAR_NUM , ECPC.BOND_BEGN_DATE , ECPC.BOND_FNSH_DATE , ECPC.GUAR_QT , ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = ECPC.GATE_CD AND UUID = ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ATT_FILE_CNT , ECPC.RMK
,(SELECT CORP_TYPE FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = ECPC.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = ECPC.PY_BUYER_CD) AS CORP_TYPE FROM STOCECPC ECPC WHERE ECPC.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECPC.BUYER_CD = (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) AND ECPC.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECPC.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ECPC.PR_BUYER_CD = #{PR_BUYER_CD} AND ECPC.PR_DEPT_CD = #{PR_DEPT_CD} AND ECPC.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND ECPC.PAY_CNT NOT IN ('0', '-1') AND ECPC.PAY_CNT = #{PAY_CNT} AND ECPC.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT GETBUYERDEPTNAME(ECPC.GATE_CD, ECPC.PR_BUYER_CD, ECPC.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , ECPC.GUAR_TYPE , ECPC.GUAR_PERCENT , ECPC.GUAR_AMT , ECPC.GUAR_TYPE2 , ECPC.GUARANTEER , CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '20' THEN (SUBSTR(ECPC.GUAR_NUM, 7, 14), '') WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '10' THEN (SUBSTR(ECPC.GUAR_NUM, 7, 18), '') END GUAR_NUM , CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '20' THEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM ECPC.CONT_CNT WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '10' THEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM END GUAR_REQ_NUM , ECPC.INSU_STATUS , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = ECPC.GATE_CD AND UUID = ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ATT_FILE_CNT , ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM , (SELECT CONT_USER_ID FROM STOCECCT WHERE GATE_CD = ECPC.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = ECPC.BUYER_CD AND CONT_NUM = ECPC.CONT_NUM AND CONT_CNT = ECPC.CONT_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS CONT_USER_ID FROM STOCECPC ECPC WHERE ECPC.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECPC.BUYER_CD = (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) AND ECPC.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECPC.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ECPC.PY_BUYER_CD = #{PR_BUYER_CD} AND ECPC.PY_DEPT_CD = #{PR_DEPT_CD} AND ECPC.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND ECPC.PAY_CNT = '0' AND ECPC.GUAR_TYPE = 'CONT' AND ECPC.GUAR_PERCENT > 0 AND ECPC.GUAR_TYPE2 IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT GETBUYERDEPTNAME(ECPC.GATE_CD, ECPC.PR_BUYER_CD, ECPC.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , ECPC.GUAR_TYPE , ECPC.GUAR_PERCENT , ECPC.GUAR_QT , ECPC.GUAR_AMT , ECPC.GUAR_TYPE2 , ECPC.GUARANTEER , CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '20' THEN (SUBSTR(ECPC.GUAR_NUM, 7, 14), '') WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '10' THEN (SUBSTR(ECPC.GUAR_NUM, 7, 18), '') END GUAR_NUM , CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '20' THEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM ECPC.CONT_CNT WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '10' THEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM END GUAR_REQ_NUM , ECPC.INSU_STATUS ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = ECPC.GATE_CD AND UUID = ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ATT_FILE_CNT , ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT CONT_USER_ID FROM STOCECCT WHERE GATE_CD = ECPC.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = ECPC.BUYER_CD AND CONT_NUM = ECPC.CONT_NUM AND CONT_CNT = ECPC.CONT_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS CONT_USER_ID FROM STOCECPC ECPC WHERE ECPC.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECPC.BUYER_CD = (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) AND ECPC.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECPC.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ECPC.PY_BUYER_CD = #{PR_BUYER_CD} AND ECPC.PY_DEPT_CD = #{PR_DEPT_CD} AND ECPC.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND ECPC.GUAR_TYPE = 'ADV' AND ECPC.GUAR_PERCENT > 0 AND ECPC.GUAR_TYPE2 IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT GETBUYERDEPTNAME(ECPC.GATE_CD, ECPC.PR_BUYER_CD, ECPC.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , ECPC.GUAR_TYPE , ECPC.GUAR_PERCENT , ECPC.GUAR_QT , ECPC.GUAR_AMT , ECPC.GUAR_TYPE2 , ECPC.GUARANTEER , CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '20' THEN (SUBSTR(ECPC.GUAR_NUM, 7, 14), '') WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '10' THEN (SUBSTR(ECPC.GUAR_NUM, 7, 18), '') END GUAR_NUM , CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '20' THEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM ECPC.CONT_CNT WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '10' THEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM END GUAR_REQ_NUM , ECPC.INSU_STATUS ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = ECPC.GATE_CD AND UUID = ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ATT_FILE_CNT , ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT CONT_USER_ID FROM STOCECCT WHERE GATE_CD = ECPC.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = ECPC.BUYER_CD AND CONT_NUM = ECPC.CONT_NUM AND CONT_CNT = ECPC.CONT_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS CONT_USER_ID FROM STOCECPC ECPC WHERE ECPC.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECPC.BUYER_CD = (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) AND ECPC.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECPC.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ECPC.PY_BUYER_CD = #{PR_BUYER_CD} AND ECPC.PY_DEPT_CD = #{PR_DEPT_CD} AND ECPC.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND ECPC.GUAR_TYPE = 'WARR' AND ECPC.GUAR_PERCENT > 0 AND ECPC.GUAR_TYPE2 IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT GETBUYERDEPTNAME(ECPC.GATE_CD, ECPC.PR_BUYER_CD, ECPC.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , ECPC.GUAR_TYPE AS DI_GUAR_TYPE , ECPC.GUAR_AMT AS DI_GUAR_AMT ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = ECPC.GATE_CD AND UUID = ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS DI_ATT_FILE_CNT , ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM AS DI_ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCECPC ECPC WHERE ECPC.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECPC.BUYER_CD = (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) AND ECPC.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECPC.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ECPC.PY_BUYER_CD = #{PR_BUYER_CD} AND ECPC.PY_DEPT_CD = #{PR_DEPT_CD} AND ECPC.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND ECPC.GUAR_TYPE = 'DIF' AND ECPC.GUAR_AMT > 0 AND ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.PAY_CNT = '-1' AND ECPC.DEL_FLAG = '0'
mapper.update: UPDATE STOCECPC SET GUAR_REQ_NUM = NULL , GUAR_NUM = NULL , GUAR_RESULT = NULL , INSU_STATUS = NULL , GUAR_TYPE2 = NULL , GUARANTEER = NULL , BOND_BEGN_DATE = NULL , BOND_FNSH_DATE = NULL , GUAR_CANCEL_STATUS = 'E' , GUAR_CANCEL_CONFIRM_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE GUAR_REQ_NUM = #{GUAR_REQ_NUM} AND GUAR_TYPE = #{GUAR_TYPE}
mapper.select: SELECT ECRL.BUYER_CD , ECRL.CONT_NUM , ECRL.CONT_CNT , ECRL.FORM_NUM , ECRL.CONTRACT_TEXT_NUM , ECRL.CONTRACT_TEXT FROM STOCECRL ECRL WHERE ECRL.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECRL.BUYER_CD = (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) AND ECRL.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECRL.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT}

SELECT ECCT.CONT_NUM , ECCT.CONT_CNT , ECCT.VENDOR_CD , VNGL.VENDOR_NM , ECCT.PROGRESS_CD , ECCT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM , ECCT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL , ECCT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND UUID = ECCT.VENDOR_ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS VENDOR_ATT_FILE_CNT , ECCT.APP_DOC_NUM , ECCT.APP_DOC_CNT , ECRL.CONTRACT_TEXT_NUM , ECCT.AUTO_RENEW_FLAG , (SELECT PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCECCM WHERE GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCECCT ECCT JOIN STOCECRL ECRL ON (ECCT.GATE_CD = ECRL.GATE_CD AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = ECRL.BUYER_CD AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = ECRL.CONT_NUM AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = ECRL.CONT_CNT AND ECRL.FORM_SQ = '0' AND ECRL.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (ECCT.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND ECCT.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD AND VNGL.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM = #{BUNDLE_NUM} AND ECCT.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND ECCT.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD}

SELECT ECCT.BUYER_CD , ECCT.CONT_NUM , ECCT.CONT_CNT ,(SELECT CONT_TYPE FROM STOCECRL ECRL JOIN STOCECCF ECCF ON (ECRL.GATE_CD = ECCF.GATE_CD /** 2020.08.11 제외 AND ECRL.BUYER_CD = ECCF.BUYER_CD*/ AND ECRL.FORM_NUM = ECCF.FORM_NUM AND ECCF.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECRL.GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND ECRL.BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND ECRL.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND ECRL.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND ECRL.FORM_SQ = '0' AND ECRL.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS CONT_TYPE , ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD , ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD , ECCM.VENDOR_CD , ECCM.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCECCT ECCT JOIN STOCECCM ECCM ON (ECCT.GATE_CD = ECCM.GATE_CD AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = ECCM.BUYER_CD AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = ECCM.CONT_NUM AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = ECCM.CONT_CNT AND ECCM.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM = #{BUNDLE_NUM} AND ECCT.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT}

SELECT UUID , UUID_SQ , FILE_NM , FILE_PATH , FILE_SIZE , FILE_EXTENSION , REAL_FILE_NM , BIZ_TYPE , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , FILE_SQ , DEL_FLAG , ENC_FLAG , COMPANY_CD , PR_BUYER_CD , UP_DATE , COMPANY_DEPT , PR_DEPT_CD FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND UUID = #{PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM}

SELECT GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , CONT_NUM , CONT_CNT , SIGN_ID , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , SIGN_DATE , SIGN_VALUE , VENDOR_CD , USER_TYPE , VID_RANDOM ,(SELECT IRS_NO FROM STOCVNGL WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS IRS_NO FROM STOCECSV WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND USER_TYPE = 'S'

SELECT GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , CONT_NUM , CONT_CNT , SIGN_ID , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , SIGN_DATE , SIGN_VALUE , VENDOR_CD , USER_TYPE , VID_RANDOM ,(SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CUST_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS IRS_NO FROM STOCECSV WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND USER_TYPE = 'B'

SELECT DISTINCT POHD.PO_NUM , POHD.VENDOR_CD , GETBUYERNAMES(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.BUYER_CD, 'PO', PODT.PO_NUM, PODT.PO_SQ, NULL, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , POHD.SUBJECT , (POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PO_CREATE_DATE , (ECCT.CONT_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ' ~ ' (ECCT.CONT_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CONT_START_END_DATE , ((SELECT MAX(DUE_DATE) FROM STOCPODT WHERE GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND PO_NUM = PODT.PO_NUM AND PURCHASE_TYPE = 'G'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DUE_DATE , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM FROM STOCPODT PODT JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCECCT ECCT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND PODT.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND PODT.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT) WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ECCT.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT VNGL.VENDOR_NM , NULL AS RECV_USER_ID , ECCT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM AS RECV_USER_NM , ECCT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL AS RECV_EMAIL , ECCT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM AS RECV_TEL_NUM , '1' AS RELAT_YN -- 2021.06.30 : 선정품의 완료 후 SMS 수수료 부과 ,(SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD) AS CORP_NO ,(SELECT DEPT_CD FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND USER_ID = ECCT.CONT_USER_ID) AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , ECCT.CONT_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'SMS_CONT_4300' '@@' ECCT.GATE_CD '@@' ECCT.BUYER_CD '@@' ECCT.CONT_NUM '@@' ECCT.CONT_CNT '@@' ECCT.VENDOR_CD AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCECCT ECCT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (ECCT.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND ECCT.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND (ECCT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR ECCT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM IS NOT NULL )
UNION ALL
SELECT X.* FROM ( SELECT VNGL.VENDOR_NM , CVUR.USER_ID AS RECV_USER_ID , CVUR.USER_NM AS RECV_USER_NM , CVUR.EMAIL AS RECV_EMAIL , CVUR.CELL_NUM AS RECV_TEL_NUM , '1' AS RELAT_YN -- 2021.06.30 : 선정품의 완료 후 SMS 수수료 부과 ,(SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD) AS CORP_NO ,(SELECT DEPT_CD FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND USER_ID = ECCT.CONT_USER_ID) AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , ECCT.CONT_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'SMS_CONT_4300' '@@' ECCT.GATE_CD '@@' ECCT.BUYER_CD '@@' ECCT.CONT_NUM '@@' ECCT.CONT_CNT '@@' ECCT.VENDOR_CD AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCECCT ECCT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (ECCT.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND ECCT.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (ECCT.GATE_CD = CVUR.GATE_CD AND ECCT.VENDOR_CD = CVUR.COMPANY_CD AND (CVUR.MAIL_FLAG = '1' OR CVUR.SMS_FLAG = '1') AND (CVUR.EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR CVUR.CELL_NUM IS NOT NULL) AND CVUR.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} ORDER BY CVUR.MNG_YN DESC ) X ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT CUST.CUST_NM AS VENDOR_NM , CVUR.USER_NM AS RECV_USER_NM , CVUR.USER_ID AS RECV_USER_ID -- 2021.07.02 : 선정품의 완료 후 SMS 수수료 부과 ,(SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD) AS CORP_NO ,(SELECT DEPT_CD FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND USER_ID = ECCT.CONT_USER_ID) AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , ECCT.CONT_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'SMS_CONT_4300' '@@' ECCT.GATE_CD '@@' ECCT.BUYER_CD '@@' ECCT.CONT_NUM '@@' ECCT.CONT_CNT '@@' ECCT.VENDOR_CD AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCECCT ECCT JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (ECCT.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND ECCT.VENDOR_CD = CUST.CUST_CD) JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (ECCT.GATE_CD = CVUR.GATE_CD AND ECCT.VENDOR_CD = CVUR.COMPANY_CD AND (CVUR.MAIL_FLAG = '1' OR CVUR.SMS_FLAG = '1') AND (CVUR.EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR CVUR.CELL_NUM IS NOT NULL) AND CVUR.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} ORDER BY CVUR.MNG_YN DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= 2

SELECT CUST.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO , ECPC.PY_DEPT_CD AS BRC , (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , ECPC.PY_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'CONT' '@@' ECPC.GATE_CD '@@' ECPC.BUYER_CD '@@' ECPC.CONT_NUM '@@' ECPC.CONT_CNT '@@' ECPC.PR_BUYER_CD '@@' ECPC.PR_DEPT_CD '@@' ECPC.VENDOR_CD '@@' ECPC.PAY_CNT '@@' ECPC.PY_BUYER_CD '@@' ECPC.PY_DEPT_CD AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE , ECPC.PAY_AMT AS CONT_AMT -- EPRO_WRS_DS='30' OR '40'일 때 계약금액 필수 ,(CASE WHEN ECCT.CONT_REQ_CD = '10' THEN '01' ELSE '02' END) AS EPRO_RATE_DSC -- 단가코드 (01 : 최초, 02 : 재입찰/재계약/재요청) FROM STOCECPC ECPC JOIN STOCECCT ECCT ON (ECCT.GATE_CD = ECPC.GATE_CD AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = ECPC.BUYER_CD AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = ECPC.CONT_NUM AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = ECPC.CONT_CNT AND ECCT.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (ECPC.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND ECPC.PY_BUYER_CD = CUST.CUST_CD) WHERE ECPC.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECPC.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND ECPC.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECPC.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ECPC.PR_BUYER_CD = #{PR_BUYER_CD} AND ECPC.PR_DEPT_CD = #{PR_DEPT_CD} AND ECPC.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND ECPC.PAY_CNT = '0' AND ECPC.PY_BUYER_CD = #{PY_BUYER_CD} AND ECPC.PY_DEPT_CD = #{PY_DEPT_CD}

SELECT CUST.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO , ECCT.DEPT_CD AS BRC , (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , ECCT.CONT_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'CONT' '@@' ECCT.GATE_CD '@@' ECCT.BUYER_CD '@@' ECCT.CONT_NUM '@@' ECCT.CONT_CNT AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE , ECCT.CONT_AMT AS CONT_AMT -- EPRO_WRS_DS='30' OR '40'일 때 계약금액 필수 ,(CASE WHEN ECCT.CONT_REQ_CD = '10' THEN '01' ELSE '02' END) AS EPRO_RATE_DSC -- 단가코드 (01 : 최초, 02 : 재입찰/재계약/재요청) FROM STOCECCT ECCT JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (ECCT.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = CUST.CUST_CD) WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ECCT.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT VNGL.IRS_NO AS CORP_NO , '000000' AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT ,((SELECT SIGN_ID FROM STOCECSV WHERE GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND VENDOR_CD = ECCT.VENDOR_CD AND USER_TYPE = 'S'), #{ses.userId}) AS USER_ID , 'CONT' '@@' ECCT.GATE_CD '@@' ECCT.BUYER_CD '@@' ECCT.CONT_NUM '@@' ECCT.CONT_CNT AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE , ECCT.CONT_AMT AS CONT_AMT -- EPRO_WRS_DS='30' OR '40'일 때 계약금액 필수 ,(CASE WHEN ECCT.CONT_REQ_CD = '10' THEN '01' ELSE '02' END) AS EPRO_RATE_DSC -- 단가코드 (01 : 최초, 02 : 재입찰/재계약/재요청) FROM STOCECCT ECCT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (ECCT.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND ECCT.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ECCT.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT CUST.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO , ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD AS BRC , (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , ECCT.CONT_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'CONT' '@@' ECCM.GATE_CD '@@' ECCM.BUYER_CD '@@' ECCM.CONT_NUM '@@' ECCM.CONT_CNT '@@' ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD '@@' ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD '@@' ECCM.VENDOR_CD AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE ,(CASE WHEN ECCT.CONT_REQ_CD = '10' THEN '01' ELSE '02' END) AS EPRO_RATE_DSC -- 단가코드 (01 : 최초, 02 : 재입찰/재계약/재요청) FROM STOCECCM ECCM JOIN STOCECCT ECCT ON (ECCM.GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND ECCM.BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND ECCM.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND ECCM.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND ECCT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (ECCM.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD = CUST.CUST_CD AND CUST.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECCM.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCM.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND ECCM.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECCM.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD = #{PR_BUYER_CD} AND ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD = #{PR_DEPT_CD} AND ECCM.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD}

SELECT CUST.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO , ECCT.DEPT_CD AS BRC , (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , ECCT.CONT_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'CONT' '@@' ECCT.GATE_CD '@@' ECCT.BUYER_CD '@@' ECCT.CONT_NUM '@@' ECCT.CONT_CNT AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE ,(CASE WHEN ECCT.CONT_REQ_CD = '10' THEN '01' ELSE '02' END) AS EPRO_RATE_DSC -- 단가코드 (01 : 최초, 02 : 재입찰/재계약/재요청) FROM STOCECCT ECCT JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (ECCT.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = CUST.CUST_CD) WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ECCT.DEL_FLAG = '0'
UNION ALL
SELECT CUST.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO ,(SELECT B.DEPT_CD FROM STOCECSV A JOIN STOCCVUR B ON (A.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND A.VENDOR_CD = B.COMPANY_CD AND A.SIGN_ID = B.USER_ID) WHERE A.GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND A.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND A.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND A.VENDOR_CD = ECCT.VENDOR_CD AND A.USER_TYPE = 'B') AS BRC , (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT ,(SELECT A.SIGN_ID FROM STOCECSV A JOIN STOCCVUR B ON (A.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND A.VENDOR_CD = B.COMPANY_CD AND A.SIGN_ID = B.USER_ID) WHERE A.GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND A.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND A.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND A.VENDOR_CD = ECCT.VENDOR_CD AND A.USER_TYPE = 'B') AS USER_ID , 'CONT' '@@' ECCT.GATE_CD '@@' ECCT.BUYER_CD '@@' ECCT.CONT_NUM '@@' ECCT.CONT_CNT AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE ,(CASE WHEN ECCT.CONT_REQ_CD = '10' THEN '01' ELSE '02' END) AS EPRO_RATE_DSC -- 단가코드 (01 : 최초, 02 : 재입찰/재계약/재요청) FROM STOCECCT ECCT JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (ECCT.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND ECCT.VENDOR_CD= CUST.CUST_CD) WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ECCT.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT VNGL.IRS_NO AS CORP_NO , '000000' AS BRC , (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT ,(SELECT SIGN_ID FROM STOCECSV WHERE GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND VENDOR_CD = ECCT.VENDOR_CD AND USER_TYPE = 'S') AS USER_ID , 'CONT' '@@' ECCM.GATE_CD '@@' ECCM.BUYER_CD '@@' ECCM.CONT_NUM '@@' ECCM.CONT_CNT '@@' ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD '@@' ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD '@@' ECCM.VENDOR_CD AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE ,(CASE WHEN ECCT.CONT_REQ_CD = '10' THEN '01' ELSE '02' END) AS EPRO_RATE_DSC -- 단가코드 (01 : 최초, 02 : 재입찰/재계약/재요청) FROM STOCECCM ECCM JOIN STOCECCT ECCT ON (ECCM.GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND ECCM.BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND ECCM.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND ECCM.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND ECCT.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (ECCM.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND ECCM.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) WHERE ECCM.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCM.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND ECCM.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECCM.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD = #{PR_BUYER_CD} AND ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD = #{PR_DEPT_CD} AND ECCM.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD}

SELECT ( CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN ECPC_M.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM ELSE ECCM.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM END) AS PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCECCT ECCT JOIN STOCECCM ECCM ON (ECCM.GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND ECCM.BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND ECCM.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND ECCM.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND ECCM.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCECPC ECPC_M ON (ECPC_M.GATE_CD = ECCM.GATE_CD AND ECPC_M.BUYER_CD = ECCM.BUYER_CD AND ECPC_M.CONT_NUM = ECCM.CONT_NUM AND ECPC_M.CONT_CNT = ECCM.CONT_CNT AND ECPC_M.PR_BUYER_CD = ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD AND ECPC_M.PR_DEPT_CD = ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD AND ECPC_M.VENDOR_CD = ECCM.VENDOR_CD AND ECPC_M.PAY_CNT = '0' AND ECPC_M.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ((ECCT.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd}) OR (ECCT.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND (#{ses.companyCd} IN (ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD, ECPC_M.PY_BUYER_CD, ECCM.VENDOR_CD))) ) AND ECCM.BUYER_CD = (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) AND ECCM.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECCM.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND (CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN ECPC_M.PY_BUYER_CD ELSE ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD END) = #{BUYER_CD}

SELECT A.CONT_NUM , A.CONT_CNT , A.BUYER_CD , A.BUYER_NM , A.PY_BUYER_CD , A.PY_DEPT_CD , A.PR_BUYER_CD , A.PR_BUYER_NM , A.PR_DEPT_CD , A.PR_DEPT_NM ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(A.GATE_CD, A.PR_BUYER_CD, A.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , A.CONT_USER_ID , A.CONT_USER_NM , A.CONT_DESC , A.PROGRESS_CD , A.VENDOR_CD , CASE WHEN A.CONT_TYPE = '1120' THEN GETBUYERDEPTNAME(A.GATE_CD, A.VENDOR_CD, A.VENDOR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) ELSE A.VENDOR_NM END AS VENDOR_NM , A.CONT_TYPE , A.BUNDLE_NUM , A.SIGN_STATUS ,(A.CONT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_DATE ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND UUID = A.ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ATT_FILE_CNT , A.ATT_FILE_NUM , A.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM , A.VENDOR_DEPT_CD , A.GUAR_TYPE , A.PAY_CNT , A.INSU_STATUS , A.GUAR_PERCENT , A.GUAR_AMT , A.GUAR_TYPE2 , A.GUARANTEER , CASE WHEN A.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND A.GUARANTEER = '20' THEN A.GUAR_REQ_NUM A.CONT_CNT WHEN A.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND A.GUARANTEER = '10' THEN A.GUAR_REQ_NUM END GUAR_REQ_NUM_CNT , A.GUAR_REQ_NUM , A.GUAR_NUM , A.PRE_GUAR_TYPE2 , A.PRE_GUARANTEER , CASE WHEN A.PRE_GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND A.PRE_GUARANTEER = '20' THEN A.PRE_GUAR_REQ_NUM A.CONT_CNT WHEN A.PRE_GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND A.PRE_GUARANTEER = '10' THEN A.PRE_GUAR_REQ_NUM END PRE_GUAR_REQ_NUM_CNT , A.PRE_GUAR_REQ_NUM , A.PRE_GUAR_NUM , A.GUAR_CANCEL_RMK , A.GUAR_REJECT_RMK , A.GUAR_CANCEL_STATUS , A.GUAR_CANCEL_REQ_DATE , A.GUAR_CANCEL_CONFIRM_DATE , A.GUAR_CANCEL_REJECT_DATE FROM (SELECT CT.GATE_CD , CT.BUYER_CD ,GETCUSTNAME(CT.GATE_CD, CT.BUYER_CD) AS BUYER_NM , CT.CONT_NUM , CT.CONT_CNT , CT.CONT_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(CT.GATE_CD, CT.CONT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_USER_NM , CT.CONT_DESC , CT.PROGRESS_CD , CT.BUNDLE_NUM , CT.SIGN_STATUS -- M020 , CT.CONT_DATE , CT.ATT_FILE_NUM , SS.PY_BUYER_CD , SS.PY_DEPT_CD , SS.PR_BUYER_CD ,GETCUSTNAME(SS.GATE_CD, SS.PR_BUYER_CD) AS PR_BUYER_NM , SS.PR_DEPT_CD ,GETDEPTNAME(SS.GATE_CD, SS.PR_BUYER_CD, SS.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_DEPT_NM , SS.VENDOR_CD ,GETVENDORNAME(SS.GATE_CD, SS.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , ECCF.CONT_TYPE , SS.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM , SS.VENDOR_DEPT_CD , SS.GUAR_TYPE , SS.PAY_CNT , SS.INSU_STATUS , SS.GUAR_PERCENT , SS.GUAR_AMT , SS.GUAR_TYPE2 , SS.GUARANTEER , SS.GUAR_REQ_NUM , CASE WHEN SS.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND SS.GUARANTEER = '20' THEN (SUBSTR(SS.GUAR_NUM, 7, 14), '') WHEN SS.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND SS.GUARANTEER = '10' THEN (SUBSTR(SS.GUAR_NUM, 7, 18), '') END GUAR_NUM , SS.PRE_GUAR_TYPE2 , SS.PRE_GUARANTEER , SS.PRE_GUAR_REQ_NUM , CASE WHEN SS.PRE_GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND SS.PRE_GUARANTEER = '20' THEN (SUBSTR(SS.PRE_GUAR_NUM, 7, 14), '') WHEN SS.PRE_GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND SS.PRE_GUARANTEER = '10' THEN (SUBSTR(SS.PRE_GUAR_NUM, 7, 18), '') END PRE_GUAR_NUM , SS.GUAR_CANCEL_RMK , SS.GUAR_REJECT_RMK , SS.GUAR_CANCEL_STATUS , SS.GUAR_CANCEL_REQ_DATE , SS.GUAR_CANCEL_CONFIRM_DATE , SS.GUAR_CANCEL_REJECT_DATE FROM STOCECCT CT JOIN (SELECT ECCT.GATE_CD ,ECCT.BUYER_CD ,ECCT.CONT_NUM ,ECCT.CONT_CNT ,ECPC_M.PY_BUYER_CD ,ECPC_M.PY_DEPT_CD ,(CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN ECPC_M.PY_BUYER_CD ELSE ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD END) AS PR_BUYER_CD ,(CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN ECPC_M.PY_DEPT_CD ELSE ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD END) AS PR_DEPT_CD ,ECCM.VENDOR_CD AS VENDOR_CD ,(CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN ECPC_M.PAY_AMT ELSE ECCM.CONT_AMT END) AS CONT_AMT ,(CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN ECPC_M.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM ELSE ECCM.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM END) AS PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM ,NULL AS VENDOR_DEPT_CD ,ECPC_M.GUAR_TYPE ,ECPC_M.PAY_CNT ,ECPC_M.INSU_STATUS ,ECPC_M.GUAR_PERCENT ,ECPC_M.GUAR_AMT ,ECPC_M.GUAR_TYPE2 ,ECPC_M.GUARANTEER ,ECPC_M.GUAR_REQ_NUM ,ECPC_M.GUAR_NUM ,ECPC_M.PRE_GUAR_TYPE2 ,ECPC_M.PRE_GUARANTEER ,ECPC_M.PRE_GUAR_REQ_NUM ,ECPC_M.PRE_GUAR_NUM ,ECPC_M.GUAR_CANCEL_RMK ,ECPC_M.GUAR_REJECT_RMK ,ECPC_M.GUAR_CANCEL_STATUS ,ECPC_M.GUAR_CANCEL_REQ_DATE ,ECPC_M.GUAR_CANCEL_CONFIRM_DATE ,ECPC_M.GUAR_CANCEL_REJECT_DATE FROM STOCECCT ECCT JOIN STOCECCM ECCM ON (ECCM.GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND ECCM.BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND ECCM.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND ECCM.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND ECCM.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCECPC ECPC_M ON (ECPC_M.GATE_CD = ECCM.GATE_CD AND ECPC_M.BUYER_CD = ECCM.BUYER_CD AND ECPC_M.CONT_NUM = ECCM.CONT_NUM AND ECPC_M.CONT_CNT = ECCM.CONT_CNT AND ECPC_M.GUAR_PERCENT > 0 --AND ECPC_M.GUAR_TYPE2 = '20' --AND ECPC_M.INSU_STATUS = 'DE' AND ECPC_M.GUAR_CANCEL_STATUS IS NOT NULL AND ECPC_M.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ((ECCT.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd}) OR (ECCT.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND (#{ses.companyCd} IN (ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD, ECPC_M.PY_BUYER_CD, ECCM.VENDOR_CD))) ) AND (ECCT.MANUAL_CONT_FLAG IS NULL OR ECCT.MANUAL_CONT_FLAG != '1') -- 수기계약제외(내부관리용) AND ECCT.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND ECPC_M.GUAR_CANCEL_REQ_DATE >= (#{REG_DATE_FROM}) AND ECPC_M.GUAR_CANCEL_REQ_DATE <= (#{REG_DATE_TO})
AND UPPER(ECCT.CONT_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_USER_ID}) '%'
AND (UPPER(ECCT.CONT_DESC) LIKE UPPER('%' #{CONT_NUM} '%') OR UPPER(ECCT.CONT_NUM) LIKE UPPER('%' #{CONT_NUM} '%') OR UPPER(ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM) LIKE UPPER('%' #{CONT_NUM} '%'))
AND ((UPPER(ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_BUYER_CD}) '%') OR (UPPER(ECPC_M.PR_BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_BUYER_CD}) '%') )
AND ((UPPER(ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_DEPT_CD}) '%') OR (UPPER(ECPC_M.PR_DEPT_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_DEPT_CD}) '%') )
AND UPPER(ECCM.VENDOR_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_CD}) '%'
) SS ON (SS.GATE_CD = CT.GATE_CD AND SS.BUYER_CD = CT.BUYER_CD AND SS.CONT_NUM = CT.CONT_NUM AND SS.CONT_CNT = CT.CONT_CNT) JOIN STOCECRL ECRL ON (ECRL.GATE_CD = CT.GATE_CD AND ECRL.BUYER_CD = CT.BUYER_CD AND ECRL.CONT_NUM = CT.CONT_NUM AND ECRL.CONT_CNT = CT.CONT_CNT AND ECRL.FORM_SQ = '0' AND ECRL.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCECCF ECCF ON (ECCF.GATE_CD = ECRL.GATE_CD AND ECCF.FORM_NUM = ECRL.FORM_NUM) WHERE 1 = 1 ) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND UPPER(A.CONT_USER_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_USER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(A.PR_BUYER_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_BUYER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(A.PR_DEPT_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_DEPT_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(A.VENDOR_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_NM}) '%'
AND A.GUAR_TYPE = #{GUAR_TYPE}
AND A.GUARANTEER = #{GUARANTEER}
AND A.GUAR_CANCEL_STATUS = #{GUAR_CANCEL_STATUS}
ORDER BY A.CONT_NUM DESC, A.CONT_CNT

SELECT CUST.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO , CVUR.DEPT_CD AS BRC , (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , CVUR.USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'SMS_CONT_4230' '@@' CUST.GATE_CD '@@' CUST.CUST_CD '@@' #{CONT_NUM} '@@' #{CONT_CNT} AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCCVUR CVUR JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (CUST.GATE_CD = CVUR.GATE_CD AND CUST.CUST_CD = CVUR.COMPANY_CD) WHERE CVUR.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CVUR.USER_ID = (#{CONT_USER_ID}, #{ses.userId})
